name: Confetti Fireworks
visual_summary: A button that triggers confetti fireworks when clicked, creating a celebratory effect. Typically used to add a touch of festivity to an application. Can be applied to elements that require a celebratory or attention-grabbing UI element.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready button component with the following characteristics:

Name: Confetti Fireworks
Description: A button that triggers confetti fireworks when clicked, creating a celebratory effect. Typically used to add a touch of festivity to an application. Can be applied to elements that require a celebratory or attention-grabbing UI element.

- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
